summary: Iteration 31 Testing: Verified Australian English spellings, legal-themed images, and landing page description accuracy. Landing page correctly shows 'Organise' and 'analyse' (Australian English). All 4 AI-generated legal images from emergentagent.com are loading (courtroom hero background, gavel/law books, handcuffs, prison bars). DeadlineTracker component has calendar view with list/calendar toggle tabs. PayPal payment shown instead of Stripe. Pricing is correct ($29 Full, $39 Extensive, FREE Quick Summary).

issues: Comment says 'Organize' - minor but could be updated for consistency
